name: Potato & Parsnip Home Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, bring two inches of water to a boil over high heat.
2. Peel the Idaho potatoes and parsnips; cut them into 1/2-inch cubes, and add them to the boiling water.
3. Boil for 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain well.
4. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, melt the butter.
5. Add onion and cook about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the potatoes and parsnips, salt, paprika, and pepper to the skillet.
7. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes longer over medium-high heat, stirring frequently, until the vegetables are golden brown.
(Makes 6 servings)
